docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $300.00 FILED BY MCNULTY, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT BATES, BROOK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-15-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-15-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-15-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PROOF OF SERVICE IS DEFECTIVE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL MCNULTY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BROOK BATES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-15-2017 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCNULTY, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BATES, BROOK $270.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $335.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF MCNULTY, MICHAEL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $35.00 SERVED OCT-31-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BATES, BROOK
